response.justification: Bogdan has genuine high-throughput distributed systems depth from Sociomantic/Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests per second, low-latency async I/O) and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure experience at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks), which maps well to the AI-native baseline and distributed systems requirements. However, Python — a stated must-have — is entirely absent from the resume, skills list, and all described work history, which is a hard gap that cannot be overlooked without direct clarification. TypeScript is solid and consistent across recent roles. Non-technical must-haves around stakeholder management, cross-functional coordination, and operational/on-call ownership are not evidenced in the resume narrative, and the distributed systems work is now 6+ years dated with more recent roles shifting toward product-layer TypeScript work.
strengths: Active AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP generators, agentic workflow tooling) satisfies the AI-native engineering baseline ahead of most candidates
Proven high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second using async I/O and performance-critical design
Exceptional technical breadth across embedded, distributed, mobile, GIS, and developer tooling — strong signal for the systems thinking breadth-plus-depth profile the role requires
concerns: Python is listed as a must-have and is completely absent from the resume, skills inventory, and every described role — a potentially disqualifying gap without further context from the candidate

High-throughput distributed systems work is real but dated (2018–2020); the last four years of experience are primarily TypeScript product engineering with no evident reliability engineering or scale challenges
No evidence of stakeholder management, cross-functional coordination, or on-call/incident-response ownership — all of which are explicit non-technical must-haves for this staff IC role

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience
Distributed systems depth is dated and recent roles lack scale evidence
